A

Central orchestrator for the command and logic registration system.

Creates a new AnnotationScanner for the given JDA instance.

C

Choice - Annotation Interface in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands
Represents a predefined choice for a command option.
ChoiceParser - Class in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands
 
ChoiceParser() - Constructor for class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.ChoiceParser
 
choices() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.Option
A fixed set of choices the user can pick from.
command() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.SlashCommand
The primary name of the command (e.g., "ping").

Shared utility for validating command methods and parsing option annotations.

D

de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem - package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem
 
de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api - package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api
 
de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands - package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands
Core annotations for defining Discord Slash Commands.
de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands - package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands
Provides the annotations required to define complex Slash Command hierarchies.
de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.tasksystem - package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.tasksystem
Provides classes and annotations for the automated background task system.
de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands - package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands
 
de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.subcommands - package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.subcommands
 
de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem - package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem
 
description() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.Option
A short description of what this option does.
description() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.SlashCommand
A brief description explaining what the command does.
description() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands.SlashCommandGroup
The description of the command group.
description() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands.SubCommand
A brief description of what the subcommand does.

F

FeatureRegistrar - Interface in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem
Common interface for all command and logic registration modules.

getCommands() - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem.TaskRegistrar
 

H

hour() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.tasksystem.Task
The hour of the day when the task should run (0-23).

J

JDA.Autoregister - module JDA.Autoregister
 

M

minutes() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.tasksystem.Task
The minute of the hour when the task should run (0-59).

N

name() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.Choice
The name shown to the user in the Discord selection menu.
name() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.Option
The name of the option.
name() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands.SlashCommandGroup
The name of the root command group.
name() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands.SubCommand
The name of the subcommand.

O

onReady(ReadyEvent) - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.BotListener
 
Option - Annotation Interface in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands
Defines a command option (parameter) for a Slash Command.
options() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.SlashCommand
An optional array of command arguments/options.
options() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands.SubCommand
Optional parameters for the subcommand.
optionType() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.Option
The type of the option (e.g., STRING, INTEGER, USER).

P

parseChoice(OptionType, Choice, OptionData) - Static method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.ChoiceParser
Parses and adds a choice to the option data based on the supported Discord types.
parseOptions(Option[]) - Static method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.CommandParserUtil
Converts an array of Option annotations into a list of JDA OptionData.

R

register(JDA, Reflections) - Method in interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.FeatureRegistrar
Initializes the feature and registers it within the JDA ecosystem.
register(JDA, Reflections) - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.SlashCommandRegistrar
Scans the project for SlashCommand annotations and synchronizes them with Discord.
register(JDA, Reflections) - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.subcommands.SubCommandRegistrar
Scans the project for SlashCommandGroup and SubCommand annotations.
register(JDA, Reflections) - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem.TaskRegistrar
Scans for Task annotations and initializes the background scheduler.
registerFeatures() - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.AnnotationScanner
Bootstraps the framework by scanning the classpath and initializing all features.
required() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.Option
Whether the user is required to provide a value for this option.

S

shutdown(JDA) - Method in interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.FeatureRegistrar
Gracefully shuts down the feature and releases all occupied resources.
shutdown(JDA) - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.SlashCommandRegistrar
Performs a clean shutdown of the registrar.
shutdown(JDA) - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.subcommands.SubCommandRegistrar
Performs a clean shutdown of the subcommand registrar.
shutdown(JDA) - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem.TaskRegistrar
Shuts down the internal scheduler and waits for active tasks to finish.
shutdownFeatures() - Method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.AnnotationScanner
Triggers a graceful shutdown for all registered feature modules.
SlashCommand - Annotation Interface in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands
Marks a method to be registered as a global Discord Slash Command.
SlashCommandGroup - Annotation Interface in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands
Marks a class as a container for Discord Subcommands.
SlashCommandRegistrar - Class in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands
Automated registry for Discord Slash Commands.
SlashCommandRegistrar() - Constructor for class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.SlashCommandRegistrar
 
SubCommand - Annotation Interface in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.subcommands
Marks a method as a Subcommand within a SlashCommandGroup.
SubCommandRegistrar - Class in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.subcommands
Registry for hierarchical Discord Slash Commands (Subcommands).
SubCommandRegistrar() - Constructor for class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.slashcommands.subcommands.SubCommandRegistrar
 

T

Task - Annotation Interface in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.tasksystem
Marks a method as a scheduled background task.
TaskRegistrar - Class in de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem
Automated registry for background tasks scheduled via annotations.
TaskRegistrar() - Constructor for class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.tasksystem.TaskRegistrar
 

V

validateMethod(Method) - Static method in class de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.CommandParserUtil
Validates that a method meets the framework's requirements for interaction handling.
value() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.slashcommands.Choice
The internal value sent to the bot when this choice is selected.

W

weekdays() - Element in annotation interface de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.tasksystem.Task
Defines on which days of the week the task should be executed.
